## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding new hires Mara Leighton and Matthew Panzarino to GrowthX's strategy and vision.](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a unique blend of expert strategy, tech, and hands-on execution for growth/marketing as a service](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Massive market opportunity: $3-4B serviceable obtainable market from existing SEO tool customers alone](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Underlying tech: AI workflow engine + ContentOS + Task Hub + Learning Engine to scale knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [2025 projections: $22.9M ARR, 74% margins, 3x growth efficiency ($ new ARR per $ burn)](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)

## Topics

### Company Vision & Positioning

  - [Addressing pain points of CMOs/growth leaders: expensive agencies, thin internal teams, tool overload](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Providing full growth function as a service, with transparency into process](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Combining FOMO, growth stories, and access to top expertise to drive client interest](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Positioning as premium, viable content solution vs "cheap AI content"](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)

### Market Opportunity

  - [$500B+ total addressable market from marketing/content/creative agency work](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [27,000 mid-market/enterprise SEO tool customers spending $10-40K/month](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [$3-4B serviceable obtainable market from converting those customers alone](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Technology Stack

  - [AI workflow engine to represent and scale expert workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [ContentOS to guide content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Task Hub for efficient task/expert matching](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Learning engine to evaluate quality and improve over time](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Financial Projections

  - [2025 target: $22.9M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Starting at 2 new clients/week, ramping to 4/week by Q4](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [$6M planned burn to reach targets](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [74% projected margins](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [3x growth efficiency ($ new ARR per $ burn)](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### Client Acquisition Strategy

  - [Currently more demand than capacity (50+ open opportunities)](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Becoming more selective: avoiding clients with no content history, low domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Segmenting by company stage (Series A to public) with differing approaches](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### Onboarding & Knowledge Sharing

  - [Considering week-long bootcamp for new client-facing hires](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Developing curriculum modules on strategy, content, client communication](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Leveraging diverse expertise of team to create internal/external education products](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review full investor pitch deck and 16z call recording in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Provide feedback on onboarding process and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Consider curriculum development for future new hire onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Explore ways to position GrowthX's offering as premium/high-value (vs "cheap AI content")](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Investigate potential for interview-based content and other premium formats](https://fathom.video/share/p2bdCazhFq4QGQQ_3AoR58cnJod4xcBc?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
